entry.title: Was it casual?
entry.summary:
Author: Ladybuckx

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,257Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Hey guys, This is my first fic ever. English is not my first language and I have not read this thru so I hope there are not too much mistakes. If it goes well I may write more fics but I’m not sure if I will. Enjoy reading!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Little One: What Remains
entry.summary:
Author: Nana_Raptor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,691Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck survived months of captivity, torture and physical, psychological and sexual abuse at the hands of Michael Newstead. Coming home, however, is not the same as getting his life back. While his body slowly begins to heal, Buck has to learn how to live with the aftermath of his horrendous ordeal, how to accept help without surrendering control, and how to find his place in a family and a relationship that have both been changed by his absence. Eddie wants to build a life with him, but love cannot erase trauma, undo what was done or protect either of them from every truth left buried in the aftermath. Because Michael Newstead may be dead, but the damage he caused is still unfolding—and not every danger waiting for Buck belongs to the past.---or: A very dark and explicit story about Buck discovering that surviving prolonged captivity, torture and abuse does not mean the nightmare is over—especially when recovery comes with new limits, love comes with buried truths, and some dangers are much closer than anyone realises.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Eye of the Tiger
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,534Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 132

Summary: Flash. Eddie gave her one last look. She was close enough to see the individual whiskers fanning from her muzzle, beaded with rain. Close enough to smell her—the dense, musky, warmth of her body permeating Eddie’s nose. He didn’t dare breathe too hard. The way her ears flicked left no doubt she was listening for them. When the lightning flashed for a final time, the tiger’s amber eyes burned into his. OR Eddie and Theo are at the zoo when a cyclone hits.

entry.title: a slow burning thing
entry.summary:
Author: avidreader0202

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,303Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: "I have a lifetime left of love to give you."Eddie means every word.The universe, however, seems determined to test that theory. Or, a hardware store catches fire, Buck and Eddie finally confess their feelings, and everyone has a really terrible day.

entry.title: What's Past Is Prologue
entry.summary:
Author: Duochanfan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,592Chapters: 8/63Kudos: 194

Summary: Moving to LA with Shannon and Christopher was supposed to save his marriage. But Eddie Diaz is facing more than just recovery from his injuries in the sandbox. A chance meeting with former Navy SEAL Evan Buckley, and life takes a strong turn as the two rekindle a friendship that had begun in the sandbox, and their future starts to look just that little bit brighter.

entry.title: Saw You In A Dream
entry.summary:
Author: fallenandinlovewithhumanity

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,682Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: Buck only has a few moments left, the ventilator has to come out and his own mind is fighting to keep him inside. He knows what's waiting for him on the other side, if he could just break through and let the air fill his lungs. OR Buck wakes up and realizes he might not be needed, but sure as hell is wanted. Day Three: emergency contact | hospital | "so, how is he?"

entry.title: The Calling (It's a Choice)
entry.summary:
Author: Will_of_Alexander

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,658Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 332

Summary: Ever since the Diaz boys moved to El Paso, Buck has been estranged from their lives. Eddie first, and then Christopher. He's lived a lot since then. Gotten married, had a kid, gotten divorced. But the second his phone rings with the name "Chris 🦖" Buck knows something is wrong. Will he take the call? Will it become his calling? Does he even have a choice?

entry.title: Different Town
entry.summary:
Author: Kiray

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,029Chapters: 7/39Kudos: 16

Summary: Post-military life as a single father in the city was demanding on a good day. When Eddie realised that his was no longer sustainable, he decided to switch gears completely. Had he ever imagined Christopher and himself in a place like Crescent Falls? Absolutely not. Yet, rediscovering his skills from long before the army, working as a ranch hand for someone called Bobby and meeting a guy named Buck... All of it sent him on a journey, that would end up rattling every aspect of his life. OR the one in which Eddie (closed off, repressed and zeroed in), gives up city life for a ranch in the middle of nowhere to provide for his son and finds way more than he was looking for.

entry.title: From Horror to Horror
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,610Chapters: 22/24Kudos: 3

Summary: Maddie and Doug are spending the day at Hersheypark. At the end of the day, as they are leaving Hersheypark, Maddie gets kidnapped. Maddie doesn’t have much fight in her as she knows if she does get out of this she is just going back to her life with Doug. Eventually she manages to fight back and she makes it out of there alive. But trying to heal from her trauma from the kidnapping is hard enough on its own and it feels completely impossible when she is still with Doug and he blames her for getting kidnapped and gets mad at her for struggling to cope.

entry.title: Remind Me You're Here
entry.summary:
Author: fallenandinlovewithhumanity

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,568Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: He didn't mean to see them, much less react to them. But he can help thinking that Buck didn’t just get hurt this time. He almost didn’t come back. OR Chris needs a moment and Buck & Eddie make sure he knows that being scared isn't something he needs to be ashamed of. Day Four: tattoos | lichtenberg figure | "hey, we all have things we do to cope—i get new tattoos"

entry.title: man enough
entry.summary:
Author: coreliot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,867Chapters: 8/30Kudos: 43

Summary: The world hits Eddie Diaz with sharp jabs; punches to the gut, chest, face. And he’s caught, trapped, between the blows—that are fast and hard like snipers to his left, like Greggs with a bullet in his chest, like Shannon bloody on the ground—and relief. Relief that comes quick and far between, like Christopher in his arms, like the 118 by his side, like a cold beer in his kitchen, just him and Buck. He’s always alternating between the two, never not ready for the blow, never not waiting for relief to end. That’s all he’s known, all he’s ever known. Or Eddie’s been the man of the house since he turned 11 years old. – Title from “Placing the Blame” by Self.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: mercy of truth
entry.summary:
Author: yorakashi

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,669Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 163

Summary: “Okay. So… Evan and I,” Tommy began, letting the words hang just long enough to gather attention and Eddie wanted to throw up. “We are engaged and we’re planning to get married very soon.” said Tommy while smiling and then kissing Buck on his forehead. The sentence settled into the room with a clarity that felt unreal. At the same time, Buck lifted his hand. The ring caught the light immediately, a clean silver band that stood out against his skin.Sound didn’t disappear entirely, but voices blending like they were happening in another room. The station was still there, the people, the movement, the familiar environment Eddie had spent years navigating without thinking, but none of it felt accessible anymore. All Eddie could focus on was that hand, that ring, and the fact that Buck still hadn’t looked at him. Buck and Tommy are engaged and Eddie felt like he was dying inside. or Eddie tries to stay supportive, silent, just a friend. But years of unspoken feelings and buried truths begin to surface, until they can no longer be contained. On the day of the wedding, when no sign comes to stop what feels inevitable, Eddie understands that silence is no longer an option.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: How to Train a Dad
entry.summary:
Author: Salve_El_Atun

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,010Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Evan "Buck" Buckley may be the most famous striker in Los Angeles, but that doesn't mean he has the first clue how to survive a four-year-old who's determined to turn every day into an adventure. When a series of unexpected changes leaves his career in the hands of Eddie Díaz —a publicist whose carefully organized life collides spectacularly with Buck's chaos— Buck begins to realize there are some things no amount of talent can prepare him for. Like being a dad.Like learning to let someone else in.And, most importantly, how to keep up with Theo Buckley. Fortunately for Buck, Theo has never had any trouble deciding who belongs in his family.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: please (just give me something for the pain)
entry.summary:
Author: TwoBlueGoldfish

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,705Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: When he first started at the 118, the migraines seemed to come back in full force. After hours of research, he learned that the irregular sleep schedule that came with being a firefighter was probably the cause of it. The more he paid attention to it, the more it made sense. Nights where they were woken up by the alarm and interrupted his sleep usually resulted in a headache of some level. Once his irregular schedule became more regular to him, the headaches lessened. Still, there were usually a handful of days a month where they plagued him. He had a carefully built routine for when this happened.   or: buck has a migraine and eddie takes care of him

entry.title: Raising Buck
entry.summary:
Author: Salenora

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,745Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 47

Summary: Post Lawsuit---------------------Buck is refused to return to work, he loses his job, his family, is financially wrecked. So he leaves everything behind and happens to eventually meet the chances, he learns what family really means. But can the 118 firefam redeem themselves? [YOU DONT NEED TO WATCH RAISING HOPE TO READ THIS]

entry.title: It Doesn't "Couch" Like It Used To
entry.summary:
Author: taylorbrynne

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,132Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: Buck has just done something so incredibly stupid that he has half a mind to walk to the Santa Monica Pier, jump off, and never look back (if he’s lucky, maybe he could convince a pod of dolphins to take his sorry ass in). And to think, this all started with a couch. Eddie’s couch specifically. Or Buck tells Eddie he loves him, maybe not in so many words.---------------I guess this is technically a prequel to the first fic in this series (it’s what Buck said to warrant Eddie’s reaction in the first fic), but technically the reading order doesn’t matter.

entry.title: honey buttercream
entry.summary:
Author: tiredwrites

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,752Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 120

Summary: “S-Stop trying to butter me up, Diaz,” Buck grumbles, a little breathless. “It’s not working. You’re just going to have to wait for a taste.” Buck waggles the spatula in his direction threateningly, and Eddie slumps, grumbling softly as he keeps his head on Buck’s shoulders. “This house is a nightmare,” Eddie grouses with no heat behind it, shaking his head as he brings his hand back to rest it on Buck’s hip, fitting his digits into the softness there. “Can’t even get a taste of frosting on my birthday. You’re a cruel, cruel man, Evan Buckley,” Eddie bemoans—he can’t even have a taste of his own cake on his birthday before they cut it later. But he can get a taste of a different cake… - or; happy birthday eddie
